title: Fnaf Universe: ReBuilt
description: A mod made with the goal of letting you build using FNAF content with as much available customization and as little restrictions as possible.
body:
![discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f7b778994a8c63dfaf4e6bb66101646746da0ae7.png) ![youtube](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/25d575b0dd13c1733e423fbe174f2322e6ac7074.png) ![geckolib](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cc28e183cf1b77f4dd138d642ab532c181b25658.png)
![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8c31873f74000c88172037d1936220bb75e86f1d_0.webp) # "PUT BACK TOGETHER, BETTER THAN EVER"
![mimic](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/48ef0891c1cf25285fa3b0172ffdb048a9797f96_0.webp) ### [One block, but a near infinite amount of customizability] This block is our take on Framed Blocks. The shape of the block is dictated by the player, and each side of each bit of this block can have its own texture applied to it, letting you create as many blocks and textures as you could possibly need. You can apply the textures of any block from any mod onto any side of this block. ![mimic_ss](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9b2d1eacec9a90e53a9da01e113e724be4a69dd4_0.webp) ![decal](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a71790f9ad6acbaedf858db63ef0c94611d99018_0.webp) ### [Apply extra layers of depth to any texture] This item holds a wide selection of Decals that can be applied onto the side of any block from any mod, at any height (off-grid), letting you push the customizability just that much further. ![decal_ss](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dac0e30dc2fc06589fc5457d46f3cca6437dd1c0_0.webp) ![prop](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a2ff74e75f6eeaed06830241edc22ffc72885319_0.webp) ### [Decorate EXACTLY as you imagine] When it comes to our props, the MINECRAFT grid is nothing. They can be placed ANYWHERE in the world at ANY orientation and ANY offset, letting you place them exactly where you want them to be. ![prop_ss](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/13ecfed87be7fd2f0e58659f1e327cce255ca015_0.webp)
![discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f7b778994a8c63dfaf4e6bb66101646746da0ae7.png) ![youtube](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/25d575b0dd13c1733e423fbe174f2322e6ac7074.png) ![geckolib](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cc28e183cf1b77f4dd138d642ab532c181b25658.png)
![legacy](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/110f27364662ce4e7b5e8b82b319347256703feb.png) **FNaF Universe: LEGACY is the original 1.12.2 version of the FNaF Universe Mod and it is no longer receiving updates! Thank you so much for all of the years of Fazbear fun!** "Remember to smile, for you are the face of Freddy Fazbear's Pizza!" For anyone still interested in using the legacy 1.12.2 version of the mod: The FNaF Universe LEGACY Mod is FULLY DEPENDENT on BookwormAPI. The mod will NOT work without it. Please install BookwormAPI alongside the FNaF Universe Mod in order to play. REBUILT will be fully dependent on GECKOLIB instead! Download Fnaf Universe LEGACY Here: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/fnaf-ur Download Bookworm Here: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/bookworm
